message:
feat(polyfills): add Phase 15 Node.js compat - stream, net, timers, util

- stream.addAbortSignal(): attach AbortSignal to existing streams
- stream.compose(): compose multiple streams into single Duplex
- Duplex.from(): create Duplex from async generators or iterable pairs
- net.BlockList: IP filtering with address/range/subnet (IPv4/IPv6)
- timers/promises scheduler: wait() and yield() for cooperative scheduling
- util.MIMEType/MIMEParams: MIME type parsing and manipulation

Also fixed tree-shaking to properly include parent modules for submodule
paths (e.g., timers/promises now correctly includes timers.js).
